# freeswitch Provider

Manage FreeSWITCH configuration through the FreeSWITCH IaC control-plane API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    freeswitch = {
      source = "local/freeswitch"
    }
  }
}

provider "freeswitch" {
  endpoint     = "https://localhost:8080"
  token        = var.freeswitch_token
  ca_cert_file = "../../deploy/tls/ca.crt"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ca_cert_file` (String) Path to a CA cert (PEM) to verify the control-plane TLS cert. Env: `FREESWITCH_CACERT`.
- `endpoint` (String) Control-plane base URL. Env: `FREESWITCH_ENDPOINT`. Example `https://localhost:8080`.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS verification. Env: `FREESWITCH_INSECURE`. Not for production.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Bearer token for `/api/v1`. Env: `FREESWITCH_TOKEN`.
